title: All Music Everywhere
description: Allows all Vanilla Minecraft songs (except 5, 13, and 11) to play regardless of where you are.
body: Ever get tired of hearing the same few songs on loop while working on a project? Ever wish you could listen to every song that Minecraft has to offer? Well wish no longer! This pack takes every song in the game (excluding music discs 5, 11, and 13) and allows them to play regardless of which biome you are in!
